filters.label: Vegan
filters.definition: Dish contains no animal products whatsoever — no meat, poultry, seafood, dairy, eggs, honey, or animal-derived additives.

filters.label: Vegetarian
filters.definition: Dish contains no meat, poultry, or seafood but may include dairy and/or eggs.

filters.label: No Pork
filters.definition: Dish contains no pork, ham, bacon, lard, prosciutto, pancetta, or any other porcine ingredient.

filters.label: Gluten Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no gluten-containing ingredients (wheat, barley, rye, most oats) and is prepared to avoid cross-contamination.

filters.label: Dairy Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no milk, cheese, butter, cream, yogurt, or any other dairy-derived ingredient.

filters.label: Egg Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no eggs or egg-derived ingredients, including mayonnaise, egg wash, or albumin.

filters.label: Soy Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no soy or soy-derived ingredients, including soy sauce, tofu, tempeh, edamame, or soybean oil.

filters.label: Fish Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no fish or fish-derived ingredients, including fish sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and anchovies.

filters.label: Shellfish Free
filters.definition: Dish contains no shellfish (shrimp, crab, lobster, clams, oysters, scallops) or shellfish-derived ingredients.

filters.label: High Protein
filters.definition: Dish provides a high amount of protein per serving, generally 25g or more.

filters.label: Has Full Ingredient List
filters.definition: Dish has a complete list of ingredients publicly disclosed on the menu or by the restaurant.

filters.label: Has Allergen Information
filters.definition: Restaurant has disclosed allergen information for this dish.

filters.label: Has Dietary Information
filters.definition: Restaurant has disclosed dietary classification information for this dish (vegan, gluten-free, etc.).

filters.label: High Transparency
filters.definition: Dish meets Goldpan's High Transparency standard across all four dimensions: ingredients, sauces, allergens, and preparation.

filters.label: Moderate Transparency
filters.definition: Dish meets Goldpan's Moderate Transparency standard with strong but incomplete disclosure.

filters.label: Building Transparency
filters.definition: Dish is at the Building Transparency level — partial disclosure with significant gaps remaining.
